children.text: You can saved My Profile, Friends List, Chat List, and Purchase History if you register WiBee Talk account using e-mail address. It can set setting > privacy setting > account register/management
Data will be deleted from your previous device if you log in using a different device.

Depending on telecom operators in certain countries or regions, it may take a while for you to receive your SMS verification code. 
Sometimes verification codes are sent to your spam message box due to telecom operators policy.
